holdings.infoBox: RSPE is an equity ETF with a total of 188 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 1.12%, Intel at 0.96%, Advanced Micro Devices at 0.92%, Humana at 0.89%, and Fortinet at 0.88%.

overview.description: The Invesco ESG S&P 500 Equal Weight ETF (RSPE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of S&P 500 companies that exhibit environmental, social, and governance (ESG) characteristics. RSPE was launched on Nov 17, 2021 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P 500 Equal Weight Scored & Screened Leaders Select Index
